response.justification: Candidate is a capable senior full-stack engineer with strong breadth across TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, plus founder experience and a track record of mentoring through workshops. However, the role explicitly requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems with compute/storage/hardware focus. The resume shows only a brief ~6-month C/C++ stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015 and no production cloud compute platform work. Core hard requirements are not met.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background with embedded, web, and backend experience
Demonstrated mentoring and teaching via workshops, dojos, and Selenium courses
Some high-throughput, low-latency microservices experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
concerns: Far below the 8-year C++ requirement — only a short C/C++ role in 2014–2015
No production cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed infrastructure ownership shown
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at the required scale

key_factors.factor: Lacks large-scale cloud compute platform background
